reviews.summary: Fixed concurrent temp file corruption (mktemp+trap), truncation detection (sentinel+min line count), frontmatter validation (head -1), sed digit regex, cached extract_body to eliminate double reads, removed dead epic-status case

Fixed atomic staging disconnected from steps (integrated draft.tmp/ with .state/ dir + cleanup + forced re-init), cross-platform sha256sum/shasum detection, git metadata error handling for detached HEAD and zero-commit repos, directory creation sequencing, removed redundant SHA validation in refresh fallback

Fixed git metadata error handling for detached HEAD/zero-commit repos, added mkdir -p for track directory in both standard and quick mode, fixed stale spec-draft.md reference in plan-draft.md, added track ID collision fallback chain, added empty --quick description handling, cross-platform JSON validation (python3/node/jq)

Fixed [~] resume underspecified (added 4-step partial work detection), git commit failure handling (pre-commit hooks, lock files), ACID verification recovery contradiction (revert [x] to [!] before halting), phase boundary detection gap (added Step 4.6), architecture mode activation wording inconsistency (normalized to Step 1.6 reference), non-TDD path quality bar (added verification evidence requirements), condensation subroutine dangling cross-ref (inlined actionable steps), session recovery mechanism (new section), completed track format in tracks.md

Fixed 7 dead /draft:upload refs, 1 dead /draft:regression ref, learn vs pattern-learning.md conflation, 3 tier mismatches, 2 unmatched inbound claims, stale jira-sync.md refs, missing incident-response Jira sync. Logical workflow audit: PASS — all 6 execution chains coherent.
